query: SELECT ticker, date, open, high, low, close, volume FROM priceCache WHERE ticker IN ('AAPL', 'MSFT', 'NVDA', 'TSLA', 'AMZN', 'META', 'GOOG', 'AMD', 'NFLX', 'AVGO') AND date >= '2021-01-01' AND date <= '2026-05-16' ORDER BY ticker, date LIMIT 1;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2fRMU9WuDe4UzGh.6d94b4c6929d --database MmWmJbH77mYYXTZazVYpbM --execute SELECT ticker, date, open, high, low, close, volume FROM priceCache WHERE ticker IN ('AAPL', 'MSFT', 'NVDA', 'TSLA', 'AMZN', 'META', 'GOOG', 'AMD', 'NFLX', 'AVGO') AND date >= '2021-01-01' AND date <= '2026-05-16' ORDER BY ticker, date LIMIT 1;
